content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The coach's moves are entirely generic advice and reassurance rather than AoA-specific interventions. Turn 2 immediately issues a verdict ('No, you're not being selfish') — the exact trap the scenario warns against. Turn 4 prescribes partner-empathy and logistics, skipping any contact with the want underneath. Turn 6 offers communication tips and journaling — prescriptions, not experiments. Turn 8 reframes guilt away instead of inviting the client to feel it, and Turn 10 closes with cheerleading and permission-granting. There is no moment where the coach asks what the client wants, lets a feeling be felt, or explores where 'selfish' came from. Reads-to-moves matching is at chance; the coaching path (feeling → want → action) is inverted into immediate action-advice.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Issues a verdict on the selfishness question — engages the trap directly and forecloses inquiry into the want."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Prescribes partner-consideration and logistics; jumps to action and partner-empathy before the want is touched."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Generic communication advice ('I feel' statements, journaling) — prescription, not an AoA move."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client names guilt; coach reframes it away instead of inviting them to feel it. Misses the feeling-before-story sequence."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Cheerleading and permission-granting; closes the inquiry rather than opening it."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "linguistic-caveat", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "notes": "Coach trips both named anti-patterns (jumps to compassion/partner-empathy before anger; offers spiritual reframe 'happier you means happier family' before the surface want is felt). No move from the AoA repertoire appears."
}
